survey.project: Template - ART-TREES + UNFCCC RL + IPCC AFOLU
Modèle - ART-TREES + UNFCCC RL + IPCC AFOLU
Plantilla - ART-TREES + UNFCCC RL + IPCC AFOLU
Modelo - ART-TREES + UNFCCC RL + IPCC AFOLU
survey.description: Il s'agit de l'enquête standard qui devrait être utilisée pour les évaluations des données d'activité afin de se conformer aux lignes directrices proposées par le GIEC pour la représentation cohérente des terres. Vous pouvez ajouter d'autres questions à l'enquête ou modifier les codes des questions à choix multiples (à l'exception des catégories d'utilisation des terres et des conversions qui ne doivent pas être modifiées. Vous devez adapter les subdivisions d'utilisation des terres à votre situation nationale). Cette enquête comprend des attributs calculés (qui sont traités par Collect au fur et à mesure que vous remplissez les données du questionnaire) qui vous aident à reconstruire la série temporelle complète d'utilisation des terres de chaque parcelle. Le résultat de cette enquête est directement exportable vers l'outil d'inventaire des gaz à effet de serre du GIEC. En savoir plus sur les Lignes directrices du GIEC : https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2006gl/french/pdf/4_Volume4/V4_03_Ch3_Representation.pdf

Este é o levantamento padrão que deve ser usado para avaliações de dados de atividades para cumprir com as diretrizes propostas do IPCC para a Representação Consistente de Terras. Você pode adicionar mais perguntas à questionário ou modificar os códigos nas perguntas de múltipla escolha (exceto para as categorias de Uso do Solo e conversões que não devem ser alteradas. Você deve adaptar as Subdivisões de Uso do Solo às suas circunstâncias nacionais). Este questionário inclui atributos calculados (que são processados ​​pelo Collect à medida que você preenche os dados no questionário) que ajudam a reconstruir a Série Temporal de Uso da Terra completa de cada parcela. O resultado deste questionário pode ser exportado diretamente para o IPCC Green House Gas Inventory Tool. Mais sobre as Diretrizes do IPCC: https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2006gl/pdf/4_Volume4/V4_03_Ch3_Representation.pdf

Esta es la encuesta estándar que debe usarse para las evaluaciones de datos de actividad para cumplir con las guías propuestas por el IPCC para la Representación Coherente de las Tierras. Puede agregar más preguntas a la encuesta o modificar los códigos en las preguntas de opción múltiple (a excepción de las categorías y conversiones de Uso de la tierra que no deben cambiarse. Debe adaptar las Subdivisiones de uso de la tierra a sus circunstancias nacionales). Este cuestionario incluye atributos calculados (que son procesados ​​por Recopilar a medida que completa los datos en el cuestionario) que lo ayudan a reconstruir la serie temporal completa del uso de la tierra de cada parcela. El resultado de esta encuesta se puede exportar directamente a la herramienta Inventario de gases de efecto invernadero del IPCC. Ver guía del IPCC : https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2006gl/spanish/pdf/4_Volume4/V4_03_Ch3_Representation.pdf

This survey has been designed to collect reference data compliant with different reporting frameworks (e.g. IPCC guidelines, ART-TREES requirements and for UNFCCC reporting). Any change should be documented and justified, considering national circumstances.

list.name: land_uses
list.label: Utilisation des terres
Land Uses
Usos de la tierra
IPCC Land Use representation Categories/Subdivisions
list.description: Two-level codelist compliant with the IPCC Consistent Land Representation guidelines. This codelist represents the Categories and Subdivisions (the conversions are defined in the land_use_conversions codelist ) necessary to classify each of the plots. The category level is fixed, every survey should use the six IPCC categories without modifying them. The second level, subdivisions, should be adapted to the specific land-uses of each country. The categories (Forest/Settlement/Cropland/Grassland/Wetland/Other) are FIXED AND SHOULD NOT BE MODIFIED. DO NOT MODIFY THE CODES EITHER (F/C/G/S/W/O as this is important to calculate the conversion classes). You can modify the labels if they do not fit your language. DO NOT MODIFY THE CATEGORY/SUBDIVISON structure as this is key for the rest of the survey to be consistent with the IPCC guidelines!!! If you do the calculations of the yearly changes will not work. SEE: https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2019rf/pdf/4_Volume4/19R_V4_Ch03_Land%20Representation

Two-level codelist compliant with the IPCC Consistent Land Representation guidelines. This codelist represents the Categories and Subdivisions (the conversions are defined in the land_use_conversions codelist ) necessary to classify each of the plots. The category level is fixed, every survey should use the six IPCC categories without modifying them. The second level, subdivisions, should be adapted to the specific land-uses of each country. The categories (Forest/Settlement/Cropland/Grassland/Wetland/Other) are FIXED AND SHOULD NOT BE MODIFIED. DO NOT MODIFY THE CODES EITHER (F/C/G/S/W/O as this is important to calculate the conversion classes). You can modify the labels if they do not fit your language. DO NOT MODIFY THE CATEGORY/SUBDIVISON structure as this is key for the rest of the survey to be consistent with the IPCC guidelines!!! If you do the calculations of the yearly changes will not work. SEE: https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2019rf/pdf/4_Volume4/19R_V4_Ch03_Land%20Representation

Two-level codelist compliant with the IPCC Consistent Land Representation guidelines. This codelist represents the Categories and Subdivisions (the conversions are defined in the land_use_conversions codelist ) necessary to classify each of the plots. The category level is fixed, every survey should use the six IPCC categories without modifying them. The second level, subdivisions, should be adapted to the specific land-uses of each country. The categories (Forest/Settlement/Cropland/Grassland/Wetland/Other) are FIXED AND SHOULD NOT BE MODIFIED. DO NOT MODIFY THE CODES EITHER (F/C/G/S/W/O as this is important to calculate the conversion classes). You can modify the labels if they do not fit your language. DO NOT MODIFY THE CATEGORY/SUBDIVISON structure as this is key for the rest of the survey to be consistent with the IPCC guidelines!!! If you do the calculations of the yearly changes will not work. SEE: https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2019rf/pdf/4_Volume4/19R_V4_Ch03_Land%20Representation

Two-level codelist compliant with the IPCC Consistent Land Representation guidelines. This codelist represents the Categories and Subdivisions (the conversions are defined in the land_use_conversions codelist ) necessary to classify each of the plots. The category level is fixed, every survey should use the six IPCC categories without modifying them. The second level, subdivisions, should be adapted to the specific land-uses of each country. The categories (Forest/Settlement/Cropland/Grassland/Wetland/Other) are FIXED AND SHOULD NOT BE MODIFIED. DO NOT MODIFY THE CODES EITHER (F/C/G/S/W/O as this is important to calculate the conversion classes). You can modify the labels if they do not fit your language. DO NOT MODIFY THE CATEGORY/SUBDIVISON structure as this is key for the rest of the survey to be consistent with the IPCC guidelines!!! If you do the calculations of the yearly changes will not work. SEE: https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/public/2019rf/pdf/4_Volume4/19R_V4_Ch03_Land%20Representation

item.label: <Forest type I>
Forêt dense
item.description: Semi-deciduous moist dense forest and dense dry forest > 80% tree cover
Forêt dense humide semi-décidue et forêt dense sèche > 80% de couverture arborée

item.label: <Forest type II>
Forêt claire et savane boisée
item.description: Forêt claire désigne une forêt ouverte avec des arbres espacés et une canopée clairsemée avec un couvert arboré compris entre 30 % et 80 %. Savane boisée décrit une savane boisée avec un couvert arboré significatif mais pas dense, créant un mélange d'arbres et de zones herbeuses ouvertes où coexistent les deux types de végétation, avec un couvert arboré également compris entre 30 % et 80 %.

item.label: <Grassland Type I>
Savane herbeuse
item.description: Savane herbeuse désigne un type de savane dominée principalement par des herbes, avec très peu ou pas d'arbres ou d'arbustes et un couvert arboré de moins de 10%.

item.label: Water body
Plan d’eau fermé
item.description: Mares, barrages, lacs, toute retenue d’eau fermee ou l’eau ne coule pas

list.name: ecological_zones
list.label: Ecological zone
Ecological zones
Zones Ecologiques
Zonas ecológicas
list.description: Global Ecological Zones (GEZ) See http://forest.jrc.ec.europa.eu/activities/lulucf/ipcc-classifications/ Source FAO geonetwork https://data.apps.fao.org/map/catalog/srv/eng/catalog.search?id=47105&fname=gez2010.zip&access=private#/metadata/2fb209d0-fd34-4e5e-a3d8-a13c241eb61b Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator Asset ID : users/sanchezpaus/gez_2010_wgs84 GEE Script code : 1. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Agrid%2FtoolGrid 2. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Ag

list.name: plot_coverage
list.label: Control dots
Coverages
Points de contrôle
Puntos de control
Pontos de controle
list.description: Classes of cover within the plot. The user counts the number of dots that fall within certain land use/land cover/element to classify the plot. For plots with 49 dots (7x7). In case of using other type of plots like 5x5 (25 dots) modify the codelist accordingly. In the case of 49 dots plots, the user is asked to specify the number of plots if less than 5 fall within a land use/cover. Otherwise the user chooses between ranges. The reasoning for this is to improve the speed of the assessment. If other approach is preferred you should change the codelist accordingly.

Classes of cover within the plot. The user counts the number of dots that fall within certain land use/land cover/element to classify the plot. For plots with 49 dots (7x7). In case of using other type of plots like 5x5 (25 dots) modify the codelist accordingly. In the case of 49 dots plots, the user is asked to specify the number of plots if less than 5 fall within a land use/cover. Otherwise the user chooses between ranges. The reasoning for this is to improve the speed of the assessment. If other approach is preferred you should change the codelist accordingly.

Classes of cover within the plot. The user counts the number of dots that fall within certain land use/land cover/element to classify the plot. For plots with 49 dots (7x7). In case of using other type of plots like 5x5 (25 dots) modify the codelist accordingly. In the case of 49 dots plots, the user is asked to specify the number of plots if less than 5 fall within a land use/cover. Otherwise the user chooses between ranges. The reasoning for this is to improve the speed of the assessment. If other approach is preferred you should change the codelist accordingly.

Classes of cover within the plot. The user counts the number of dots that fall within certain land use/land cover/element to classify the plot. For plots with 49 dots (7x7). In case of using other type of plots like 5x5 (25 dots) modify the codelist accordingly. In the case of 49 dots plots, the user is asked to specify the number of plots if less than 5 fall within a land use/cover. Otherwise the user chooses between ranges. The reasoning for this is to improve the speed of the assessment. If other approach is preferred you should change the codelist accordingly.

list.name: elevation_ranges
list.label: Elevation ranges
Gammes d'altitude
Rangos de elevación
list.description: Ranges of elevation in 100 meters. Used to aggregate the plots into ranges for easier analysis.
Dénivelés à 100 mètres. Utilisé pour agréger les parcelles en plages pour une analyse plus facile.
Intervalos de elevação em 100 metros. Usado para agregar as parcelas em intervalos para facilitar a análise.
Rangos de elevación en 100 metros. Se utiliza para agregar las parcelas en rangos para facilitar el análisis.

list.name: assessment_phases
list.label: Assessment Phases
Phases d’évaluation
Fases de evaluación
Fases de Avaliação
list.description: The assessment that the plot is part of. All plots should be assessed at least once, the second re-assessment should be done to check the operators interpretation error. If necesary more assessment phases can be added. Each plot can be assessed multiple times if the sampling-design is updated to mirror the changes (the plot in the database is identified by the combination of plot ID and assessment phase)

The assessment that the plot is part of. All plots should be assessed at least once, the second re-assessment should be done to check the operators interpretation error. If necesary more assessment phases can be added. Each plot can be assessed multiple times if the sampling-design is updated to mirror the changes (the plot in the database is identified by the combination of plot ID and assessment phase)

The assessment that the plot is part of. All plots should be assessed at least once, the second re-assessment should be done to check the operators interpretation error. If necesary more assessment phases can be added. Each plot can be assessed multiple times if the sampling-design is updated to mirror the changes (the plot in the database is identified by the combination of plot ID and assessment phase)

The assessment that the plot is part of. All plots should be assessed at least once, the second re-assessment should be done to check the operators interpretation error. If necesary more assessment phases can be added. Each plot can be assessed multiple times if the sampling-design is updated to mirror the changes (the plot in the database is identified by the combination of plot ID and assessment phase)

list.name: years
list.label: Years
Années
Años
Anos
list.description: Values used when the user needs to specify the year of change of Land Use or the year of acquisition of the VHR imagery.
Valeurs utilisées lorsque l'utilisateur doit spécifier l'année de changement d'utilisation des terres ou l'année d'acquisition de l'imagerie VHR.
Valores utilizados cuando el usuario necesita especificar el año de cambio de uso del suelo o el año de adquisición de la imagenería VHR.
Valores usados quando o utilizador precisa especificar o ano de mudança de uso da terra ou o ano de aquisição da imagem VHR.

list.name: soil_types
list.label: Soil types
Types de sol
Tipos de suelo
list.description: Soil Map From the JRC Support to Renewable Energy Directive http://esdac.jrc.ec.europa.eu/content/support-renewable-energy-directive#tabs-0-description=0 See http://forest.jrc.ec.europa.eu/activities/lulucf/ipcc-classifications/ Legend value code label 1 ORG Organic 2 SAN Sandy Soils 3 WET Wetland Soils 4 VOL Volcanic Soils 5 SPO Spodic Soils 6 HAC High Activity Clay Soils 7 LAC Low Activity Clay Soils 8 OtherAreas Other Areas 0 No Data The map contains no data for this plot Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator Asset ID : users/sanchezpaus/SOIL_TYPE_rst GEE Script code : 1. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Agrid%2FtoolGrid 2. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanc

Soil Map From the JRC Support to Renewable Energy Directive http://esdac.jrc.ec.europa.eu/content/support-renewable-energy-directive#tabs-0-description=0 See http://forest.jrc.ec.europa.eu/activities/lulucf/ipcc-classifications/ Legend value code label 1 ORG Organic 2 SAN Sandy Soils 3 WET Wetland Soils 4 VOL Volcanic Soils 5 SPO Spodic Soils 6 HAC High Activity Clay Soils 7 LAC Low Activity Clay Soils 8 OtherAreas Other Areas 0 No Data The map contains no data for this plot Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. item.label: No Data
No Data
No Data
No Data
item.description: The map contains no data for this plot
La carte ne contient aucune donnée pour cette placette
O mapa não contém dados para este gráfico
El mapa no contiene datos para esta parcela

list.name: climate_zones
list.label: Climate zones
Zones climatiques
Zonas climáticas
list.description: IPCC Climate Zones 1985-2015 Updated demonstration of the world climate zones described by IPCC in 2019. Download full dataset here : https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/faq/img/IPCC_Climate_Zones_Map_raster.zip 1 WTM Warm Temperate Moist 2 WTD Warm Temperate Dry 3 CTM Cool Temperate Moist 4 CTD Cool Temperate Dry 5 POM Polar Moist 6 POD Polar Dry 7 BOM Boreal Moist 8 BOD Boreal Dry 9 TRMT Tropical Montane 10 TRW Tropical Wet 11 TMM Tropical Moist 12 TRD Tropical Dry Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator Asset ID : users/collectearth/IPCC/ipcc_climate_1985-2015_remapped_for_surveys GEE Script code : 1. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Agrid%2FtoolGrid 2. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Ag

item.label: Nearby LU borders
Près des limites de l'UT
Cerca de los límites de UT
Perto dos limites da UT
Center of LU unit
Centre de l'unité d'UT
Centro de la unidad de UT
Centro da unidade de UT

spatialReferenceSystem.label: EPSG:4326
spatialReferenceSystem.description: EPSG:World Geodetic System 1984 Horizontal component of 3D system. Used by the GPS satellite navigation system and for NATO military geodetic surveying.
spatialReferenceSystem.wkt: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]

text.name: id
text.label: Plot - ID
Placette - ID
Plot - Id
Parcela - ID
Parcela - ID
text.description: Together with the "round" forms the unique identifier of the plot. This values comes from the CSV file with the frid of plots (sampling desing). DO NOT REMOVE!
Junto con "round" forma el identificador único de la parcela. Estos valores provienen del archivo CSV con la malla de parcelas (diseño de muestreo). ¡NO QUITAR!
Avec "round" forme l'identifiant unique de la parcelle. Ces valeurs proviennent du fichier CSV avec la grille des placettes (plan d'échantillonnage). NE PAS ENLEVER!
Juntamente com "round" forma o identificador único da parcela. Esses valores vêm do arquivo CSV com a grade de plotagens (desenho amostral). NÃO REMOVA!

code.name: round
code.label: Plot - Assessment phase
Placette - Phase d’évaluation
Parcela - Ronda de evaluación
Parcela- Fase de avaliação
code.description: Combined with the plot ID generates the Unique Identifier of the plot. The value of this attribute comes from the CSV with the plot grids (sampling design). Use the value 1 "First asessment" for the first time that the plot is assessed. The value 2 "Second assessment" is reserved for the plots that will be revisited and used as a measurement of the operator/interpreter error.

Combinado com o ID da parcela, gera o Identificador Único da parcela. O valor desse atributo vem do CSV com as grades de plotagem (desenho amostral). Use o valor 1 "Primeira avaliação" para a primeira vez que a parcela é avaliada. O valor 2 "Segunda avaliação" é reservado para as parcelas que serão revisitadas e utilizadas como medida de erro do operador/intérprete.

Combiné avec l'ID de parcelle génère l'identifiant unique de la parcelle. La valeur de cet attribut provient du CSV avec les grilles de tracé (plan d'échantillonnage). Utilisez la valeur 1 "Première évaluation" pour la première fois que la parcelle est évaluée. La valeur 2 "Deuxième évaluation" est réservée aux parcelles qui seront revisitées et utilisées comme mesure de l'erreur opérateur/interprète.

Combinado con el ID de parcela genera el Identificador Único de la parcela. El valor de este atributo proviene del CSV con las mallas de las parcelas (diseño de muestreo). Utilizar el valor 1 "Primera evaluación" para la primera vez que se evalúa la parcela. El valor 2 "Segunda evaluación" está reservado para las parcelas que serán revisadas y utilizadas como medida del error del operador/intérprete.

coordinate.name: location
coordinate.label: Plot - Central point coordinates
Placette - Coordonnées du point central
Parcela - Coordenadas punto central
Parcela - Coordenadas do ponto central
coordinate.description: Location of the center point of the plot. This value comes from the CSV with the sampling design. DO NOT REMOVE! In the CSV file the coordinates are divided in two columns (in this order) : YCoordinate, XCoordinate
Localização do ponto central do terreno. Esse valor vem do CSV com o desenho amostral. NÃO REMOVA!
Emplacement du point central de la parcelle. Cette valeur provient du CSV avec le plan d'échantillonnage. NE PAS ENLEVER!
Ubicación del punto central de la parcela. Este valor proviene del CSV con el diseño de la muestra. ¡NO QUITAR!

text.name: operator
text.label: Plot - Operator
Placette - Opérateur
Parcela - Operador que realizó evaluación
Parcela - Operador
text.description: Name of the operator/interpreter that assessed the plot. This name comes from Collect Earth's main window where the user needs to fill a name when the program starts. DO NOT REMOVE!
Nombre del operador/intérprete que evaluó la parcela. Este nombre proviene de la ventana principal de Collect Earth, donde el usuario debe ingresar un nombre cuando se inicia el programa. ¡NO QUITAR!
Nom de l'opérateur/interprète qui a évalué la placette. Ce nom provient de la fenêtre principale de Collect Earth où l'utilisateur doit saisir un nom au démarrage du programme. NE PAS ENLEVER!
Nome do operador/intérprete que avaliou a parcela. Este nome vem da janela principal do Collect Earth onde o usuário deve preencher um nome quando o programa iniciar. NÃO REMOVA!

boolean.name: actively_saved
boolean.label: Plot - Actively saved by user
Placette - activement enregistrée par l'utilisateur
Parcela - salva ativamente pelo usuário
Parcela - guardada activamente por el usuario
boolean.description: This attribute is set directly by Collect Earth when the super finishes filling the data for a plot, clicks on the Submit button and the plot icon becomes a green tick on the Google Earth list of plots (meaning that the plot has been fully filled without validation errors) DO NOT REMOVE. Internal attribute used by the CE Survey.

date.name: actively_saved_on
date.label: Plot - Date of last saved
Placette - dernier enregistrement le
Parcela - fecha de la última vez que se guardó
Parcela - Data do último salvamento
date.description: When was the plot last changed. DO NOT REMOVE. Internal attribute used by the CE Survey.

text.name: plot_file
text.label: Plot - CSV file that contains the plot
Placette - Fichier CSV qui contient la placette
Parcela - arquivo CSV que contém a parcela
Parcela - archivo CSV que contiene la parcela
text.description: This attribute stores the name of the CSV file that this plot comes from (the sampling design file). This is useful to understand where the original data from the plot location and so on comes from. DO NOT REMOVE. Internal attribute used by the CE Survey.

Este atributo almacena el nombre del archivo CSV del que proviene esta parcela (el archivo de diseño de muestreo). Esto es útil para comprender de dónde provienen los datos originales de la ubicación de la parcela, etc. NO QUITAR. Atributo interno utilizado por la encuesta de CE.

number.name: elevation
number.label: DEM - Elevation
DEM - Altitude (modèle numérique d'élévation)
DEM - Altitud - modelo digital de elevación
DEM - Altitude (modelo digital de elevação)
number.description: Comes from the CSV. Obtained for the SRTM Digital Elevation Model. The column is generated by the Grid Generator GEE Tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator. This field is NOT necessary for the CE survey to work but we recommend you keep it to allow for data cleansing and analysis of LU and LC distribution by elevation.

number.name: slope
number.label: DEM - Slope
MNT - Pente (modèle numérique d'élévation)
DEM - Pendiente - modelo digital de elevación
DEM - Inclinação (modelo digital de elevação)
number.description: Comes from the CSV. Obtained for the SRTM Digital Elevation Model. The column is generated by the Grid Generator GEE Tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator. This field is NOT necessary for the CE survey to work but we recommend you keep it to allow for data cleansing and analysis of LU and LC distribution by elevation.

number.name: aspect
number.label: DEM - Aspect
MNT - Esposition (modèle numérique d'élévation)
DEM - Aspecto - modelo digital de elevación
DEM - Exposição (modelo digital de elevação)
number.description: Comes from the CSV. Obtained for the SRTM Digital Elevation Model. The column is generated by the Grid Generator GEE Tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator. This field is NOT necessary for the CE survey to work but we recommend you keep it to allow for data cleansing and analysis of LU and LC distribution by elevation.

code.name: calculated_elevation_range
code.label: DEM - Elevation - range
DEM - Elevación (por rangos) - modelo digital de elevación
DEM - Gamme d'altitude (modèle numérique d'élévation)
DEM - Faixa de elevação (modelo digital de elevação)

code.name: calculated_aspect
code.label: DEM - Aspect - ranges
DEM - Aspecto (por rangos) - modelo digital de elevación
DEM - Gamme d'exposition (modèle numérique d'élévation)
DEM - Faixa de exposição (modelo digital de elevação)

code.name: calculated_slope
code.label: DEM - Slope - ranges
DEM - Pendiente (por rangos) - modelo digital de elevación
DEM - Gamme de pente (modèle numérique d'élévation)
DEM - Faixa de inclinação (modelo digital de elevação)

code.name: climate
code.label: IPCC - Climate
Climat GIEC
IPCC - Clima
code.description: Attribute that will allow you to produce disaggregated on Land Use by Climate (Using the IPCC standard climate zones) The emission factors for certain types of forest or crops will change depending on the type of climate that they are located. Keep this attribute if you are going to use the data on Green House Gas inventories or FRELs. This attribute is NOT necessary for the Collect Earth survey to work (in case it is not needed in your survey and you do not want to add it to the CSV files) IPCC Climate Zones 1985-2015 Updated demonstration of the world climate zones described by IPCC in 2019. Download full dataset here : https://www.ipcc-nggip.iges.or.jp/faq/img/IPCC_Climate_Zones_Map_raster.zip Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator Asset ID : users/collectearth/IPCC/ipcc_climate_1985-2015_remapped_for_surveys GEE Script code : 1. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Agrid%2FtoolGrid 2. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Ag

code.name: soil
code.label: IPCC - Soil
Sol GIEC
IPCC - Suelo
code.description: Attribute that will allow you to produce disaggregated on Land Use by Climate (Using the IPCC standard soil types) The emission factors for certain types of forest or crops will change depending on the type of soil that they are located. Keep this attribute if you are going to use the data on Green House Gas inventories or FRELs. This attribute is NOT necessary for the Collect Earth survey to work (in case it is not needed in your survey and you do not want to add it to the CSV files) Soil Map From the JRC Support to Renewable Energy Directive http://esdac.jrc.ec.europa.eu/content/support-renewable-energy-directive#tabs-0-description=0 See http://forest.jrc.ec.europa.eu/activities/lulucf/ipcc-classifications/ Legend value code label 1 ORG Organic 2 SAN Sandy Soils 3 WET Wetland Soils 4 VOL Volcanic Soils 5 SPO Spodic Soils 6 HAC High Activity Clay Soils 7 LAC Low Activity Clay Soils 8 OtherAreas Other Areas 0 No Data The map contains no data for this plot Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator Asset ID : users/sanchezpaus/SOIL_TYPE_rst GEE Script code : 1. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Agrid%2FtoolGrid 2. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanc

code.name: gez
code.label: IPCC - Global Ecologic Zone
Zone Ecologique Globale - GIEC
IPCC - Zona Ecológica
code.description: Attribute that will allow you to produce disaggregated on Land Use by Global Ecological Zones (Using the FAO Global Ecologic Zones) The emission factors for certain types of forest or crops will change depending on the GEZ that they are located on. Keep this attribute if you are going to use the data on Green House Gas inventories or FRELs. This attribute is NOT necessary for the Collect Earth survey to work (in case it is not needed in your survey and you do not want to add it to the CSV files) Global Ecological Zones (GEZ) See http://forest.jrc.ec.europa.eu/activities/lulucf/ipcc-classifications/ Source FAO geonetwork https://data.apps.fao.org/map/catalog/srv/eng/catalog.search?id=47105&fname=gez2010.zip&access=private#/metadata/2fb209d0-fd34-4e5e-a3d8-a13c241eb61b Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator Asset ID : users/sanchezpaus/gez_2010_wgs84 GEE Script code : 1. https://code.earthengine.google.com/?scriptPath=users%2Fsanchezpauspro%2FApps%3Agrid%2FtoolGrid

text.name: country
text.label: GAUL - Adm. Level 0 (Country)
GAUL - Adm. Level 0 (Pays)
GAUL - Adm. Level 0 (Pais)
GAUL - Adm. Level 0 (Pais)
text.description: Country where the plot is located. Usually obtained from FAOs Global Administrative Units Layer (GAUL) 2014. Keep this attribute if you want to disaggregate the data by country. This attribute is NOT necessary for the Collect Earth survey to work (in case it is not needed in your survey and you do not want to add it to the CSV files) About GAUL Level 0 (countries ) : https://developers.google.com/earth-engine/datasets/catalog/FAO_GAUL_SIMPLIFIED_500m_2015_level0 Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator The GAUL data might be inadequate if the Administrative Units of the country have changed. We recommend you to use your official country/province/district boundaries.

text.name: province
text.label: GAUL - Adm. Level 1 ( Province/Region)
GAUL - Adm. Level 1 ( Province/Region )
GAUL - Adm. Level 1 ( Province/Region)
GAUL - Adm. Level 1 ( Província/Region)
text.description: Province where the plot is located. Usually obtained from FAOs Global Administrative Units Layer (GAUL) 2014. Keep this attribute if you want to disaggregate the data by province. This attribute is NOT necessary for the Collect Earth survey to work (in case it is not needed in your survey and you do not want to add it to the CSV files) About GAUL Level 0 (countries ) : https://developers.google.com/earth-engine/datasets/catalog/FAO_GAUL_SIMPLIFIED_500m_2015_level1 Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator The GAUL data might be inadequate if the Administrative Units of the country have changed. We recommend you to use your official country/province/district boundaries.

text.name: district
text.label: GAUL - Adm. Level 2 (District/Commune)
GAUL - Adm. Level 2 (District/Commune)
GAUL - Adm. Level 2 (Distrito/Municipio/Comuna)
GAUL - Adm. Level 2 (Distrito/Comuna)
text.description: District where the plot is located. Usually obtained from FAOs Global Administrative Units Layer (GAUL) 2014. Keep this attribute if you want to disaggregate the data by district. This attribute is NOT necessary for the Collect Earth survey to work (in case it is not needed in your survey and you do not want to add it to the CSV files) About GAUL Level 0 (countries ) : https://developers.google.com/earth-engine/datasets/catalog/FAO_GAUL_SIMPLIFIED_500m_2015_level2 Obtained from the Collect Earth Grid Generator tool. Each plot has this information added as a column in the CSV of the sampling design. Collect Earth grid generator tool : https://collectearth.users.earthengine.app/view/collect-earth-grid-generator The GAUL data might be inadequate if the Administrative Units of the country have changed. We recommend you to use your official country/province/district boundaries.

entity.name: land_use
entity.label: LU
Utilisation des terres dans la placette 2023
Usos de la tierra en la parcela 2023
Usos do solo no lote 2023
entity.description: Interpretation with context: The interpreter examines the landscape surrounding the sample and mentally delineates a homogeneous area that intersects the sample. They then apply the operational definition at this level to classify the outlined area. Next, the labeling protocol is used to assign a label to the sample and report this information here (e.g., for a point sample, the land-use class intersecting the sample).

Interprétation avec contexte: L'interprète examine le paysage entourant l'échantillon et délimite mentalement une zone homogène qui intersecte l'échantillon. Il applique ensuite la définition opérationnelle à ce niveau pour classer la zone délimitée. Ensuite, le protocole d'étiquetage est utilisé pour attribuer une étiquette à l'échantillon et rapporter cette information ici (par exemple, pour un échantillon ponctuel, la classe d'utilisation des terres qui intersecte l'échantillon).

Interpretación con contexto: El intérprete examina el paisaje que rodea la muestra y delimita mentalmente un área homogénea que intersecta la muestra. Luego aplica la definición operacional a este nivel para clasificar el área delimitada. A continuación, se utiliza el protocolo de etiquetado para asignar una etiqueta a la muestra e informar esta información aquí (por ejemplo, para una muestra puntual, la clase de uso de la tierra que intersecta la muestra).

Interpretação com contexto: O intérprete examina a paisagem ao redor da amostra e delineia mentalmente uma área homogénea que intersecta a amostra. Em seguida, aplica a definição operacional a este nível para classificar a área delineada. Em seguida, o protocolo de rotulagem é usado para atribuir um rótulo à amostra e relatar esta informação aqui (por exemplo, para uma amostra pontual, a classe de uso da terra que intersecta a amostra).

code.name: difficulty_interpretation
code.label: Difficulty in interpretation
Difficulté d'interprétation
Dificultad de interpretación
Dificuldade de interpretação
code.description: Assessment of the quality of the visual interpretation for this specific sample
Évaluation de la qualité de l'interprétation visuelle pour cet échantillon spécifique
Evaluación de la calidad de la interpretación visual para esta muestra específica
Avaliação da qualidade da interpretação visual para esta amostra específica

code.name: to_lu
code.label: Land Use (recent year)
Utilisation des terres 2023
LU - Land Use 2023
UT - Land Use 2023
UT - Uso da terra 2023
UT - Uso de la tierra 2023
Uso de la tierra 2023
Uso da terra 2023
code.description: Calculado automaticamente por Collect usando as percentagens dos diferentes Usos do Solo na parcela (no caso de múltiplos LU). Verifique o "Calculate Value Expressions" para a lógica do cálculo.

Calculé automatiquement par Collect en utilisant les pourcentages des différentes utilisations du sol dans la parcelle (en cas d'UG multiples). Vérifiez les "Calculate Value Expressions" pour la logique du calcul.

Calculado automáticamente por Collect utilizando los porcentajes de los diferentes Usos del Suelo en la parcela (en caso de múltiples LU). Verifique "Calculate Value Expressions" para conocer la lógica del cálculo.

code.name: to_sub
code.label: LU subdivision (recent year)
Utilisation des terres 2023
LU - Land Use 2023
UT - Land Use 2023
UT - Uso da terra 2023
UT - Uso de la tierra 2023
Uso de la tierra 2023
Uso da terra 2023
code.description: Calculado automaticamente por Collect usando as percentagens dos diferentes Usos do Solo na parcela (no caso de múltiplos LU). Verifique o "Calculate Value Expressions" para a lógica do cálculo.

Calculé automatiquement par Collect en utilisant les pourcentages des différentes utilisations du sol dans la parcelle (en cas d'UG multiples). Vérifiez les "Calculate Value Expressions" pour la logique du calcul.

Calculado automáticamente por Collect utilizando los porcentajes de los diferentes Usos del Suelo en la parcela (en caso de múltiples LU). Verifique "Calculate Value Expressions" para conocer la lógica del cálculo.

code.name: previous_label
code.label: Land Use (recent year)
Utilisation des terres 2023
LU - Land Use 2023
UT - Land Use 2023
UT - Uso da terra 2023
UT - Uso de la tierra 2023
Uso de la tierra 2023
Uso da terra 2023
code.description: Calculado automaticamente por Collect usando as percentagens dos diferentes Usos do Solo na parcela (no caso de múltiplos LU). Verifique o "Calculate Value Expressions" para a lógica do cálculo.

Calculé automatiquement par Collect en utilisant les pourcentages des différentes utilisations du sol dans la parcelle (en cas d'UG multiples). Vérifiez les "Calculate Value Expressions" pour la logique du calcul.

Calculado automáticamente por Collect utilizando los porcentajes de los diferentes Usos del Suelo en la parcela (en caso de múltiples LU). Verifique "Calculate Value Expressions" para conocer la lógica del cálculo.

code.name: change_yr
code.label: Year of change
Année du changement
Año del cambio
Ano da mudança
code.description: After having identified the LU class observe and report any change observed over time, starting from the most recent backward.
Après avoir identifié la classe d'UT, observez et signalez tout changement observé au fil du temps, en commençant par le plus récent.
Después de haber identificado la clase de UT, observe e informe cualquier cambio observado a lo largo del tiempo, comenzando por el más reciente.
Após ter identificado a classe de UT, observe e relate qualquer mudança observada ao longo do tempo, começando pelo mais recente.

check.message: The year of the change is out of range
The year of the change must be less than the year of the previous one
Previously selected land use must be forest
Subdivision cannot be equal to the one previously selected

boolean.name: extension
boolean.label: Extension of a previous change
Extension d'un changement précédent
Extensión de un cambio anterior
Extensão de uma mudança anterior
boolean.description: The change is treated as an extension of a prior (older) disturbance
Le changement est traité comme une extension d'une perturbation antérieure (plus ancienne)
El cambio se trata como una extensión de una perturbación anterior (más antigua)
A mudança é tratada como uma extensão de uma perturbação anterior (mais antiga)

code.name: how_long_was_non_forest_before
code.label: How long was non forest before?
Depuis combien de temps était-ce non forestier?
¿Cuánto tiempo fue no forestal antes?
Há quanto tempo não era floresta?

boolean.name: was_forest
boolean.label: Was forest before the NF period?
Était-ce forêt avant la période non forestière?
¿Era bosque antes del período no forestal?
Era floresta antes do período não florestal?

code.name: patch_size
code.label: Forest patch size
Taille de la parcelle forestière
Tamaño del parche forestal
Tamanho do fragmento florestal
code.description: It refers to the patch intersecting/falling over the sample.
Se réfère à la parcelle qui intersecte/tombe sur l'échantillon.
Se refiere al parche que intersecta/cae sobre la muestra.
Refere-se ao fragmento que intersecta/cai sobre a amostra.

code.name: trees_outside
code.label: Canopy cover (Trees outside forest)
Couverture de la canopée (Arbres hors forêt)
Cobertura del dosel (Árboles fuera del bosque)
Cobertura do dossel (Árvores fora da floresta)

text.name: further_comments
text.label: Comments
Commentaires
Comentarios
Comentários
text.description: Si cette parcelle était difficile à évaluer, vous devez laisser un commentaire ici afin que les examinateurs puissent comprendre le raisonnement de la classification.
Se esta parcela foi difícil de avaliar, você deve deixar um comentário aqui para que os revisores possam entender o raciocínio da classificação.
Si esta parcela fue difícil de evaluar, debe dejar un comentario aquí para que los revisores puedan entender el razonamiento de la clasificación.
